name: Level 01: Apartment
emotional_goal: Something is wrong. The world is functioning, but I am disconnected from it.
gameplay_goal: Move around the room, turn off the screen, then leave through the door.
narrative_beat: The character wakes. Content continues by itself. Silence appears when the screen is turned off.

player_start.description: Inside the object-built apartment floor, near the warm window light.

acceptance_criteria: Player cannot leave the visible room boundary.
Screen is reachable and can be turned off.
Door blocks progress until screen_off is true.
Door is reachable after the screen is turned off.
Transition message appears after using the door.
